description: Demonstrates the refactored frost behavior with sustain_notes enabled. Each audible note still seeds its own local frost bloom, but the generated notes within each bloom are extended to a shared local end time.

phrases.comment: The same three-note source line as the reference and unsustained demos. Compare this render with the unsustained version to hear how sustain_notes stretches each local frost bloom without changing its staggered start times.

score_transforms.comment: One frost iteration per audible seed with sustain_notes enabled. Each local replay-plus-edges group is extended to its own latest audible end time after normal stochastic scheduling.
score_transforms.name: frost_effect
